title: Diet
content:
There was a young lady named Perkins,
     Who had a great fondness for gherkins;
        She went to a tea
        And ate twenty-three,
     Which pickled her internal workin's.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Diet"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
